name: codex-blocking-exec
description: A Codex hook plugin that runs explicitly marked long commands inside PreToolUse and returns one final result.

interface.shortDescription: Block inside a hook for marked long-running Bash commands.
interface.longDescription: Codex Blocking Exec ships a PreToolUse hook that intercepts commands prefixed with codex-block --, runs the real command synchronously inside the hook, captures a log, and rewrites the Bash tool call to report the final exit code and output tail.
defaultPrompt: Run this long command with codex-block.
